channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day
channel.description: A fresh dad joke every day. Get the app at dadjokes.vip

item.title: What’s the biggest diamond in the world?
item.description:
What’s the biggest diamond in the world?
A baseball diamond.

item.title: What doesn’t get any wetter no matter how hard it rains?
item.description:
What doesn’t get any wetter no matter how hard it rains?
The ocean.

item.title: How can you carry water in a net?
item.description:
How can you carry water in a net?
Freeze it.

item.title: What do you get when you mix poison ivy with a four-leaf clover?
item.description:
What do you get when you mix poison ivy with a four-leaf clover?
A rash of good luck.

item.title: What’s the difference between Neptune and Earth?
item.description:
What’s the difference between Neptune and Earth?
There’s a world of difference!

item.title: Why did the atom cross the road?
item.description:
Why did the atom cross the road?
Because it was time to split.

item.title: What kind of waves are impossible to swim in?
item.description:
What kind of waves are impossible to swim in?
Microwaves.

item.title: Patient: Help me, Doc. I can’t remember anything for more than a few minutes. It’s driving me crazy! Doctor: How long has this been going on?
item.description:
Patient: Help me, Doc. I can’t remember anything for more than a few minutes. It’s driving me crazy! Doctor: How long has this been going on?
Patient: How long has what been going on?

item.title: Fran: The doctor told me to drink carrot juice after a hot bath. June: Do you like the carrot juice?
item.description:
Fran: The doctor told me to drink carrot juice after a hot bath. June: Do you like the carrot juice?
Fran: I don’t know yet. I’m still drinking the hot bath.

item.title: How did the police know the photographer was guilty?
item.description:
How did the police know the photographer was guilty?
They found his prints all over the scene of the crime.
